title: antennaria plantaginifolia var. arnoglossa
intro: Antennaria plantaginifolia var. arnoglossa, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and woolly leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive upset, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms. Antennaria plantaginifolia var. arnoglossa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
